title: DANTE TERMINAL Adventure Data Schema
description: Defines the structure for adventure scenario data consumed by AdventureLoader. Location descriptions are constrained to ≤60 tokens (~240 chars) per L-012 token budget requirements. Designed for on-device LLM prompt injection via keyword-triggered lore entries.

openingNarrative.description: Cold-open text shown on adventure start (≤90 words per BL-013)

startLocationId.description: ID of the location where the player begins

startInventory.description: Item IDs the player starts with

locations.description: All explorable locations in the adventure

questFlags.description: Initial quest flag state (all flags with default values)

description.description: Lore entry for GM prompt injection. MUST be ≤60 tokens (~240 chars). Contains key sensory details, notable objects, and exit info.

keywords.description: Trigger words that activate this location's lore entry in prompt assembly

atmosphere.description: Short mood/tone descriptor for GM voice calibration

exits.description: Available movement directions from this location

itemIds.description: IDs of items discoverable in this location

npcIds.description: IDs of NPCs present in this location

direction.description: Compass direction or spatial label (north, south, east, west, up, down)

blocked.description: Whether this exit is initially impassable

blockedBy.description: Description of what blocks this exit (for GM narration)

requiredFlag.description: Quest flag that must be true to use this exit

description.description: Lore entry for prompt injection (≤50 tokens)

keywords.description: Trigger words that activate this item's lore entry

foundLocationId.description: Location ID where this item is first discoverable

isStartingItem.description: Whether the player begins with this item

consumable.description: Whether the item is destroyed on use

target.description: What the item is used on (location ID, item ID, NPC ID, or 'passive')

setsFlag.description: Quest flag set to true when this interaction occurs

consumesItem.description: Whether this interaction destroys the item

description.description: Lore entry for prompt injection (≤55 tokens)

keywords.description: Trigger words that activate this NPC's lore entry

locationId.description: Location ID where this NPC is found

personality.description: Brief personality sketch for GM voice calibration

dialogueHooks.description: Named dialogue triggers mapping context keys to sample dialogue

questFlags.description: Quest flags this NPC can set through interaction

act.description: Which act this puzzle belongs to (1=Orientation, 2=Escalation, 3=Resolution)

description.description: What the puzzle requires the player to accomplish

locationId.description: Primary location where this puzzle is encountered

solutions.description: Multiple solution paths (wide paths, narrow gates per BL-013)

completionFlags.description: Quest flags set when the puzzle is solved

requiredItems.description: Item IDs needed for this solution

requiredFlags.description: Quest flags that must be set for this solution

setsFlags.description: Quest flags set by completing this solution path
